title: Customer Service - 50 Phrases
definition: 50 phrases for handling customer questions, complaints, and support conversations with empathy and professionalism.

phrases.phrase: How can I help you today?
phrases.example: Hi there, how can I help you today?

phrases.phrase: I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble
phrases.meaning: Expresses empathy for a customer's problem.
phrases.example: I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble with your order.

phrases.phrase: Can you walk me through what happened?
phrases.meaning: Asks for details about an issue.
phrases.example: Can you walk me through what happened step by step?

phrases.phrase: Let me pull up your account
phrases.meaning: Signals looking into a customer's details.
phrases.example: Let me pull up your account to check the order status.

phrases.phrase: Just to confirm, you're experiencing...
phrases.example: Just to confirm, you're experiencing a login error, correct?

phrases.phrase: I completely understand your frustration
phrases.example: I completely understand your frustration - let's fix this.

phrases.phrase: Thank you for bringing this to our attention
phrases.meaning: Thanks the customer for reporting an issue.
phrases.example: Thank you for bringing this to our attention.

phrases.phrase: Let me look into that for you
phrases.example: Let me look into that for you right away.

phrases.phrase: Can you provide your order number?
phrases.example: Can you provide your order number so I can check?

phrases.phrase: I want to make sure I understand correctly
phrases.example: I want to make sure I understand correctly - is that right?

phrases.phrase: Thanks for your patience while I check this
phrases.example: Thanks for your patience while I check this with our team.

phrases.phrase: I'm here to help sort this out
phrases.example: I'm here to help sort this out as quickly as possible.

phrases.phrase: That doesn't sound right, let's fix it
phrases.meaning: Acknowledges something went wrong and commits to resolving it.
phrases.example: That doesn't sound right, let's fix it together.

phrases.phrase: I can see the issue on our end
phrases.meaning: Confirms a problem was caused by the company.
phrases.example: I can see the issue on our end - I apologize for that.

phrases.phrase: Let's get this sorted for you right away
phrases.example: Let's get this sorted for you right away.

phrases.phrase: Can you tell me a bit more about the issue?
phrases.example: Can you tell me a bit more about the issue you're facing?

phrases.phrase: Here's what I can do for you
phrases.example: Here's what I can do for you - a full refund or a replacement.

phrases.phrase: I've escalated this to our technical team
phrases.meaning: Notes the issue was passed to specialists.
phrases.example: I've escalated this to our technical team for a faster fix.

phrases.phrase: This should be resolved within 24 hours
phrases.example: This should be resolved within 24 hours.

phrases.phrase: I'll issue a refund right away
phrases.example: I'll issue a refund right away for the inconvenience.

phrases.phrase: Let me offer you a solution
phrases.example: Let me offer you a solution that works for your situation.

phrases.phrase: I'll personally follow up on this
phrases.meaning: Takes personal ownership of the issue.
phrases.example: I'll personally follow up on this until it's resolved.

phrases.phrase: You should see the changes reflected shortly
phrases.meaning: Sets expectations for when a fix will appear.
phrases.example: You should see the changes reflected shortly in your account.

phrases.phrase: I've made a note on your account
phrases.example: I've made a note on your account about this issue.

phrases.phrase: Rest assured, we'll get this fixed
phrases.example: Rest assured, we'll get this fixed as soon as possible.

phrases.phrase: I'll waive the fee as a one-time courtesy
phrases.example: I'll waive the fee as a one-time courtesy this time.

phrases.phrase: Let me double-check that for accuracy
phrases.example: Let me double-check that for accuracy before I confirm.

phrases.phrase: I'm going to expedite this for you
phrases.meaning: Commits to speeding up a process.
phrases.example: I'm going to expedite this for you given the urgency.

phrases.phrase: This is a known issue and we're working on it
phrases.example: This is a known issue and we're working on it right now.

phrases.phrase: I'll send you a confirmation email shortly
phrases.example: I'll send you a confirmation email shortly with the details.

phrases.phrase: Is there anything else I can help with?
phrases.meaning: Checks if further assistance is needed.
phrases.example: Is there anything else I can help with today?

phrases.phrase: I appreciate your understanding on this
phrases.example: I appreciate your understanding on this matter.

phrases.phrase: Let's make this right
phrases.meaning: Commits to fully resolving an issue.
phrases.example: Let's make this right - I don't want you to be unhappy.

phrases.phrase: I understand this isn't the outcome you wanted
phrases.example: I understand this isn't the outcome you wanted, and I'm sorry.

phrases.phrase: Let me see what other options are available
phrases.example: Let me see what other options are available for you.

phrases.phrase: I hear you, and I want to help
phrases.example: I hear you, and I want to help resolve this quickly.

phrases.phrase: I'm not able to do that, but here's what I can offer
phrases.meaning: Politely declines a request while offering an alternative.
phrases.example: I'm not able to do that, but here's what I can offer instead.

phrases.phrase: Let me connect you with a specialist
phrases.meaning: Transfers the customer to someone with more expertise.
phrases.example: Let me connect you with a specialist who handles this.

phrases.phrase: I completely understand why that's frustrating
phrases.example: I completely understand why that's frustrating for you.

phrases.phrase: Thank you for staying patient with us
phrases.meaning: Thanks the customer for their tolerance.
phrases.example: Thank you for staying patient with us through this.

phrases.phrase: We take this feedback seriously
phrases.meaning: Acknowledges the importance of a complaint.
phrases.example: We take this feedback seriously and will act on it.

phrases.phrase: I'll make sure this doesn't happen again
phrases.meaning: Commits to preventing a repeat issue.
phrases.example: I'll make sure this doesn't happen again going forward.

phrases.phrase: Your satisfaction is our top priority
phrases.example: Your satisfaction is our top priority here.

phrases.phrase: I'll pass this feedback along to the team
phrases.meaning: Notes the issue will be shared internally.
phrases.example: I'll pass this feedback along to the team for review.

phrases.phrase: Thank you for giving us the chance to fix this
phrases.meaning: Thanks the customer for continued trust.
phrases.example: Thank you for giving us the chance to fix this.

phrases.phrase: Please don't hesitate to contact us again
phrases.example: Please don't hesitate to contact us again if this recurs.

phrases.phrase: Have I fully resolved your concern today?
phrases.meaning: Confirms satisfaction before ending the interaction.
phrases.example: Have I fully resolved your concern today?

phrases.phrase: We value you as a customer
phrases.meaning: Reassures the customer of their importance.
phrases.example: We value you as a customer and want to keep you happy.

phrases.phrase: Thanks for reaching out, have a great day
phrases.example: Thanks for reaching out, have a great day!

phrases.phrase: It was a pleasure assisting you today
phrases.example: It was a pleasure assisting you today.

quiz.question: Which phrase best expresses empathy for a customer's frustration?
options: How can I help you today?
Can you provide your order number?
We value you as a customer
quiz.explanation: This directly validates the customer's emotional state.

quiz.question: Which phrase offers a goodwill gesture to a customer?
options: I'll waive the fee as a one-time courtesy
Let me pull up your account
Is there anything else I can help with?
quiz.answer: I'll waive the fee as a one-time courtesy
quiz.explanation: This is a goodwill gesture to make up for an inconvenience.

quiz.question: Which phrase checks if the issue was fully resolved before ending the call?
options: Have I fully resolved your concern today?
I'm sorry to hear you're having trouble
Let me connect you with a specialist
I'll issue a refund right away
quiz.answer: Have I fully resolved your concern today?
quiz.explanation: This confirms satisfaction before closing the interaction.

quiz.question: I've ___ this to our technical team for a faster fix. (passed up/escalated)
quiz.explanation: 'Escalated' means passed to a higher level of support.

quiz.question: Which phrase politely declines a request while still helping?
options: I'm not able to do that, but here's what I can offer
Thank you for bringing this to our attention
Rest assured, we'll get this fixed
quiz.answer: I'm not able to do that, but here's what I can offer
quiz.explanation: This declines the specific request while offering an alternative.
